title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 33: How to Use Free & Local Text-to-Speech for AI Voiceovers
description:
Learn how to generate AI voiceovers for free, entirely on your local computer using ComfyUI and Kokoro! In this episode, I’ll walk you through the installation, setup, and workflow needed to turn text into high-quality voiceovers using AI-generated voices.

🔹 What You'll Learn:
✔ How to install ComfyUI Kokoro and its dependencies
✔ Step-by-step guide to setting up AI text-to-speech nodes
✔ How to select and combine different voices
✔ Saving and exporting generated audio files
✔ Comparisons between free and paid AI voice models

Get the workflows and instructions from discord for free
https://discord.gg/gggpkVgBf3

Check Other Episodes
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL-pohOSaL8P9kLZP8tQ1K1QWdZEgwiBM0

Unlock exclusive perks by joining our channel:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCmMbwA-s3GZDKVzGZ-kPwaQ/join

----INSTALATION----

Install this node https://github.com/stavsap/comfyui-kokoro.git using these instructions:

go to ComfyUI_windows_portable\ComfyUI\custom_nodes
type cmd
